case_title: STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY VS. DEVONIQUE N. OWENS ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-16-2021 CONTINUED TO MAY-18-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S) OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST DEFENDANT(S) DELRON CHARLES DOYLE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DISCOVERY, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE AUG-02-2021 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION FOR ORDER DEEMING ADMITTED THE TRUTH OF MATTERS, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. MOTION GRANTED. (SEE MINI-MINUTES FOR DETAILS.) THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER REPEATING VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING AND MUST E-MAIL IT TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM AT DAVIDIDAHO14@GMAIL.COM. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Deeming Admitted The Truth Of Matters
Off Calendar Aug-02-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY's Motion For Order Deeming Admitted The Truth Of Matters.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

No opposition filed. Motion granted. The truth of the facts specified in the Requests for Admission will be deemed admitted unless responses are served at or before the hearing on this matter.

The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling and must e-mail it to the Judge Pro Tem at davididaho14@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Deeming Admitted The Truth Of Matters
Off Calendar Jun-22-2021 Continued To Aug-02-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY's Motion For Order Deeming Admitted The Truth Of Matters is Continued to August 2, 2021 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 301. Current Counsel for Defendant Owens states that new counsel will be appointed. The Court directs that appointment occur promptly so that responses to the RFAs and this motion can be prepared. If full and complete responses are not provided by the continued hearing date, all of the matters stated in the RFAs will be deemed admitted.

Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
